```{=typst}
#pagebreak()
#wcg-ws-open(
  day: "Day 1", num: 1, title: "Notice one spending pattern",
  purpose: "To see one repeated purchase clearly, without judging it.",
  how: [Pick one purchase you tend to make without much thought. Watch for it
  today. When it happens — or when you notice the urge — jot down a few words.
  There are no wrong answers.],
)

#wcg-panel(title: "Worked example")[
  *The purchase:* Afternoon coffee and a snack. \
  *Where / when:* The shop near work, around 3 p.m. \
  *What was going on:* Tired, needed a break, everyone else was going.
]

#wcg-field("The purchase I watched", lines: 1)
#wcg-field("Where and when it usually happens", lines: 1)
#wcg-field("What was going on around me", lines: 2)
#wcg-field("How I felt just before (one or two words)", lines: 1)
#wcg-field("Reflection — where and when does this usually happen?", lines: 1)

```

> **A gentle reminder.**
>
> Noticing is not judging. You are gathering information, not grading yourself.

```{=typst}
#wcg-ws-footer()
```
